---
title: "Machine Learning Models Exercise"
format: html
editor: visual
---


```{r}
library(tidyverse)
library(tidymodels)
library(here)
library(GGally)


set.seed(1234)

# Load your cleaned dataset
data <- readRDS(here("ml-models-exercise", "clean_data.rds"))
glimpse(data)
```

```{r}
glimpse(data)        # see the structure
summary(data)        # quick summary of numeric variables
```

## Pairwise Correlations
```{r}

# Select continuous variables
cont_vars <- data %>% select(Y, DOSE, AGE, HT, WT)

# Pairwise correlation plot
ggpairs(cont_vars)
```

```{r}
data <- data %>%
  mutate(BMI = 703 * WT / (HT^2))
```

## Preparing the Data for Modeling
```{r}
# Recipe
rec <- recipe(Y ~ ., data = data) %>%
  step_dummy(all_nominal_predictors())  # encode SEX or other factors
```

## Fitting the Models
Linear Model
```{r}
lin_mod <- linear_reg() %>%
  set_engine("lm")

lin_wf <- workflow() %>%
  add_recipe(rec) %>%
  add_model(lin_mod)

lin_fit <- lin_wf %>% fit(data)
lin_pred <- predict(lin_fit, data) %>% bind_cols(data)
lin_pred
```

RMSE
```{r}
rmse(lin_pred, truth = Y, estimate = .pred)
```

LASSO Regression
```{r}
lasso_mod <- linear_reg(penalty = 0.1, mixture = 1) %>%
  set_engine("glmnet")

lasso_wf <- workflow() %>%
  add_recipe(rec) %>%
  add_model(lasso_mod)

lasso_fit <- lasso_wf %>% fit(data)
lasso_pred <- predict(lasso_fit, data) %>% bind_cols(data)
rmse(lasso_pred, truth = Y, estimate = .pred)
```

Forest 
```{r}
rf_mod <- rand_forest() %>%
  set_engine("ranger", seed = 1234) %>%
  set_mode("regression")

rf_wf <- workflow() %>%
  add_recipe(rec) %>%
  add_model(rf_mod)

rf_fit <- rf_wf %>% fit(data)
rf_pred <- predict(rf_fit, data) %>% bind_cols(data)
rmse(rf_pred, truth = Y, estimate = .pred)

```

Observed vs Predicted plots
```{r}
library(ggplot2)

# Function for plotting
plot_pred <- function(df){
  ggplot(df, aes(x = Y, y = .pred)) +
    geom_point() +
    geom_abline(slope = 1, intercept = 0, color = "red") +
    labs(x = "Observed Y", y = "Predicted Y") +
    theme_minimal()
}

plot_pred(lin_pred)
plot_pred(lasso_pred)
plot_pred(rf_pred)
```

# Tuning

## LASSO tuning (no cv) --> Code stops here 
```{r}
library(tidymodels)


# Recipe: handle factors and zero-variance predictors
model_recipe <- recipe(Y ~ ., data = data) %>%
  step_dummy(all_nominal_predictors(), one_hot = TRUE) %>%  # convert categorical variables
  step_zv(all_predictors())                                  # remove predictors with zero variance

# LASSO model spec (penalty to tune)
lasso_spec <- linear_reg(penalty = tune(), mixture = 1) %>%
  set_engine("glmnet")


# Workflow
lasso_workflow <- workflow() %>%
  add_model(lasso_spec) %>%
  add_recipe(model_recipe)

# Cross-validation
cv_folds <- vfold_cv(data, v = 5, repeats = 5)


# Define penalty grid
penalty_grid <- tibble(penalty = 10^seq(-5, 2, length.out = 50))

# Tune LASSO over CV folds
lasso_cv_res <- tune_grid(
  lasso_workflow,
  resamples = cv_folds,
  grid = penalty_grid,
  metrics = metric_set(rmse)
)

# Plot RMSE vs penalty
autoplot(lasso_cv_res)
```


## LASSO + RF tuning with 5x5 CV
```{r}

# 5-fold CV repeated 5 times
cv_folds <- vfold_cv(data, v = 5, repeats = 5)

# LASSO tuning with CV
# penalty grid as numeric column
penalty_grid <- tibble(penalty = 10^seq(-5, 2, length.out = 50))

lasso_cv_res <- tune_grid(
  lasso_workflow,
  resamples = cv_folds,
  grid = penalty_grid,   # must be a numeric column
  metrics = metric_set(rmse)
)

autoplot(lasso_cv_res)


# RF tuning with CV
# Make sure rf_grid is a tibble
rf_grid <- grid_regular(
  mtry(range = c(1,7)),
  min_n(range = c(1,21)),
  levels = 7
)

rf_cv_res <- tune_grid(
  rf_workflow,
  resamples = cv_folds,
  grid = rf_grid,
  metrics = metric_set(rmse)
)

autoplot(rf_cv_res)
```

```{r}
# Best LASSO penalty
select_best(lasso_cv_res, "rmse")

# Best RF parameters
select_best(rf_cv_res, "rmse")
```

# Final Stretch 
```{r}
# Final LASSO
final_lasso <- finalize_workflow(
  lasso_workflow,
  select_best(lasso_cv_res, metric = "rmse")
) %>%
  fit(data)

# Final RF
final_rf <- finalize_workflow(
  rf_workflow,
  select_best(rf_cv_res, metric = "rmse")
) %>%
  fit(data)
```


```{r}
# Predict LASSO
lasso_preds <- predict(final_lasso, data) %>% bind_cols(data)
rmse(lasso_preds, truth = Y, estimate = .pred)

# Predict RF
rf_preds <- predict(final_rf, data) %>% bind_cols(data)
rmse(rf_preds, truth = Y, estimate = .pred)
```

```{r}
library(ggplot2)

# LASSO
ggplot(lasso_preds, aes(x = Y, y = .pred)) +
  geom_point(alpha = 0.6) +
  geom_abline(slope = 1, intercept = 0, color = "red") +
  labs(title = "Observed vs Predicted (LASSO)", x = "Observed Y", y = "Predicted Y")

# RF
ggplot(rf_preds, aes(x = Y, y = .pred)) +
  geom_point(alpha = 0.6) +
  geom_abline(slope = 1, intercept = 0, color = "blue") +
  labs(title = "Observed vs Predicted (Random Forest)", x = "Observed Y", y = "Predicted Y")
```
